children.text: giving citizens (children, youth, and adults) an opportunity to acquire the understandings and skills necessary to relate the resources of the community to the needs and interests of the community;
demonstrating programs of fundamental education and measuring results; and
training men and women as leaders in fundamental education by providing internships and other experiences.
